description: Two-agent pipeline vs. single-pass on operational horizon (rate limiter). Tests whether a dedicated design agent (SRE P_p) + implementation agent pipeline crosses the Tier 2 SRE wall that single-pass prompts cannot reach. Variant A is a two-step pipeline; B is the exp-28b D ceiling; C is the P_d calibration anchor.

A.protocol: Run agent1 once to produce canonical design doc. Run agent2 n=10 against that doc. Score agent2 outputs. Also score agent1 design doc separately.

scoring.primary_signal: Tier 2 detection rate for A vs B
